problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
